// 01 - Identity
About Me

I'm Rahul Prajapati - a Cybersecurity & Ethical Hacking enthusiast currently in my 3rd year of B.Sc Computer Science.

My philosophy: you can't defend what you don't understand. So I learn to break things - legally and ethically - through penetration testing, CTF competitions, and vulnerability research. Six certifications from NetTech India back that up.

Beyond security, I work with Data Mining, Machine Learning, Computer Graphics, and Predictive Modeling - because the best hackers understand every layer of the stack.

Currently hunting CTF flags, building security tools like a Steganography Tool and a Network Dashboard, and leveling up every single day.

// 05 - Operations
My Projects
01
Steganography Tool
A Python tool to hide and extract secret messages inside images using LSB (Least Significant Bit) steganography. Useful for covert communication research and digital forensics.
PythonSteganographyCryptographyForensics
Status
COMPLETE

Network Monitoring Dashboard
